normalized_title: Locker, romance novels, and three of everything
published_title_visible: 18. The last thing Harry Leary cared about was his locker - we found romance novels - three of each
published_title_evidence_status: transcribed from supplied YouTube Studio screenshot; an ellipsis marks visible UI truncation where present
working_source_title: Fireside BMX Chat w/ Greg Mathias - The last thing Harry Leary Cared About At The Time Was His Locker
working_source_description: Smart people have three of everything! But… The last thing Harry cared about at the time was his locker. Greg and Kyle further talk about an episode Kyle had and Greg mentioned there was no one there to tell him otherwise. A while ago, Greg told Kyle to “chew your words.” This statement has helped Kyle out tremendously but Greg is now that little angel on Kyle’s left shoulder.
